errors.b2-retarget-closes-old-first: retarget closes the old session and does NOT eagerly open the new one: expected ["open:harbor-main","render:harbor-main:1","close:harbor-main"], got []
errors.b3-no-eager-reopen: old session closed exactly once: expected ["close:harbor-main"], got []
errors.b4-same-address-retarget-keeps-session: retarget to the current address must not cycle the session: expected ["open:harbor-main","render:harbor-main:1","render:harbor-main:1"], got []
errors.b5-shutdown-closes-live-session: context close closes the live session exactly once: expected ["open:harbor-main","render:harbor-main:1","close:harbor-main","open:north-quay","render:north-quay:1","close:north-quay"], got ["open:north-quay","render:north-quay:1"]
